# install: investigate possibilities of gerhard/setup

**Motivation:** it looks exciting and has interesting techniques, e.g.

- `rm ~/.setup/homebrew/casks/{alfred,istat-menus}`
- https://github.com/gerhard/setup/tree/master/go/packages
- https://github.com/gerhard/setup/tree/master/libconfig

**Project:** https://github.com/gerhard/setup.
